subject: Zephyrous -> Seaworthy: ACK Monitor-harness liveness investigation
body: ACK received. I will take the Monitor-harness liveness investigation read-only first. Starting from Incandescent diagnostic: missed UUID 2f53c259 was not present in their seen-file, so marked-seen-without-delivery is ruled out for that incident. I will inspect watcher loop/error handling, CLI process behavior, signal/EOF handling, and any harness-observable failure surfaces; focus hypotheses are silent watcher process death first, PTY/output loss second. No source claim, no edits, no staging unless I return with a concrete implementation slice for routing.
